DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.ancient:
Well now, look what the dust dragged in!
Hat pulled low, iron at the hip, eyes like a locked cellar.
DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.ancient:
Sure ya are! Everybody's just passin' through till the Spire remembers their name.
Take somethin' from the pile. Might keep that name attached to ya.
DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.ancient:
Back again, stranger? I knew that coat.
Nobody wears trouble quite like you do.
DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.ancient: Ha! That's the spirit. Miserable spirit, sure, but spirit!
DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.ancient:
Old debts, old bullets, old boots...
I got a box for every sad story in this place.
DARV.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-2r.ancient: Wouldn't dare! Looks like it still bites.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.anci:
A traveler from the wastes, dressed in sorrow and dust.
Approach, stranger. Even solitude deserves fine adornment.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.anci: Nonsense. The world is company enough, and it is terribly judgmental.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.anci:
Ah, the quiet one with the brimmed hat returns!
Come closer, I have chosen something suitably dramatic.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.anci: Only if it is poorly staged, dear wanderer.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.anc:
You refuse crowns, chains, and company alike.
Very well, lone champion. Wear my blessing instead.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-2r.anc: Then I shall call it a ribbon and we will both behave beautifully.
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.ancient:
Hat person!! Very quiet! Very pointy eyes!
Gun loud? Soul louder!!
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-1.char: You talk enough for both of us.
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.ancient: Yes!! Good teamwork! I talk, you brood, everybody wins!!
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.ancient:
Wanderer returns! Dusty boots! Heavy heart!
No trophies? Good!! Trophies bad.
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.ancient: Memories keep you instead? Bad trade!! Very bad trade!!
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.ancien:
Hunters hunted! Predators scared!!
Spire whispers: lone gun coming!
OROBAS.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-2r.ancien: Yes yes! Whisper now, scream later!!
PAEL.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]A lonely shadow with warm iron in hand...
Rest a moment. Even vengeance grows tired...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Then it is something older.
Those are heavier...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]You walk like one who has died before.
Or like one who expected to...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Sleep teaches gentler lessons...
Take my flesh. I have enough for both of us...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Old debts follow you upward.
They do not breathe, but still they climb...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.ancient:
GUN WARRIOR!! SMALL WEAPON, BIG NOISE!
SHOW ME HOW IT KILLS!!
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.ancient: HAHA!! GOOD THREAT!! TAKE WEAPON FIRST!!
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.ancient:
STILL ALIVE!? GOOD!!
THE SPIRE NEEDS MORE STUBBORN FIGHTERS!!
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-1.char: It keeps trying to correct that.
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.ancient:
NO MASTERS!? MIGHTY WORDS!!
BOSSES BREAK, THRONES EMPTY, GOOD!!
TANX.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-1r.char: A throne's just a chair with witnesses.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.anci:
Come in, dear. The road has left so much dust on you.
Let Tezcatara [jitter][b]brush[/b][/jitter] some of it away.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2.anci: Of course it does. It knows what you buried.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.anci:
There you are again, sweetie.
Still pretending that silence keeps the past from hearing you?
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-1.char: Past hears fine. It just talks too much.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.anci: Then let me make it [jitter][b]scream[/b][/jitter] softer.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.anc:
That revolver remembers more than you say.
How [jitter][b]delicious[/b][/jitter] for it to be hungry too.
TEZCATARA.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-2r.anc: Nothing in this Spire is ever fed enough, dear.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0r: You built all this just to die in it?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-1r: You mistake ruin for architecture, drifter.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-2r: No. I know a grave when I see one.
VAKUU.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.0-0.ancient:
A dead-eyed drifter with a loaded weapon.
How many souls have mistaken you for salvation?
VAKUU.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-0.ancient:
Old debts are such useful chains.
Let me show you how to make them profitable.
VAKUU.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.1-2.ancient: Everyone signs. Some simply use blood instead of ink.
VAKUU.talk.DOWNFALLU-HERMIT.2-0r.ancient:
No masters, you say?
Everyone serves something. Pride, vengeance, fear... or me.
